title: Amore Midnight Pasta
description: A quick and delicious pasta dish featuring midnight oil and amore tomatoes.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine according to package instructions.
Heat the midnight oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the crushed amore tomatoes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Simmer the tomato sauce for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Drain the cooked linguine and add it to the skillet with the tomato sauce.
Toss the linguine in the sauce until well coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
